auto_fix_engine_scope.description: What Claude Haiku is allowed to change today (auto_fix_engine.py).
allowed: Any single file under the repo path IF Claude's JSON response sets "file" to a path that exists — there is NO hard whitelist in apply_fix().
prompt_constrains_to: The system prompt literally instructs Claude to return {"file": "server/training/node_manager.py", ...} with find/replace for keyword-list or small logic edits.
Claude only receives the first ~2000 characters of node_manager.py (plus failure JSON), not server/main.py, ADK prompts, scenarios, or synthetic_browser_client.py.
not_targeted_by_design: OpenAI caller (not used — reactive caller is Anthropic Haiku)
why_fixes_often_fail: Missing create_order / create_reservation are usually product+flow issues in the voice agent and scenario expectations, not keyword tweaks in node_manager.py.
Repeated patches to the same file without restart discipline or validation of semantic correctness can be ineffective or harmful.
